title: arctium lappa subsp. nemorosum
intro: Arctium lappa subsp. nemorosum, also known as woodland burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant (Arctium lappa) that is native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arctium lappa subsp. nemorosum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Arctium lappa subsp. nemorosum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin problems, wounds, and digestive issues.
